g.title: Tier1_RenderGraph
g.text: miki Tier1 RenderGraph — Vulkan 1.4 / D3D12 Main Pipeline
88 passes · Task/Mesh/VisBuffer · VSM · GTAO/RTAO · TAA+FSR · LL-OIT · RT · Async Compute

g.title: deferred
g.text: GBuffer + Clusters + IBL + VSM + AO → HDR RGBA16F

g.title: mat_resolve
g.text: tile 16×16: BDA fetch → DSPBR → GBuffer MRT

g.title: vsm
g.text: 16K² virtual, dirty pages only, Mesh shader

g.title: gtao
g.text: half-res, 8 dir × 2 horizon, async compute candidate

g.title: taa
g.text: Halton jitter, YCoCg clamp, motion reject
